plan.suiteName: Start Planned Project Task - Functional Happy Paths

cases.title: Start a Planned Project Task from Project search (typeahead) and verify status updates to Started
preconditions: Project '360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation' exists and has at least one Project Task with status Planned.

steps.targetDescription: Open Salesforce PSA Home page
Global search input is visible on Home page
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox

steps.targetDescription: Verify Global search is available
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox

steps.targetDescription: Enter project name in Global search
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox
steps.value: 360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation

steps.targetDescription: Typeahead results list appears
steps.locatorHint: search typeahead results listbox

steps.targetDescription: Select matching project from typeahead results
steps.locatorHint: typeahead option matching full project name

steps.targetDescription: Project Detail page header is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header title matching project name

steps.targetDescription: Verify Project Detail header shows project name
steps.locatorHint: record page header title
steps.assertion: 360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation

steps.targetDescription: Verify 'Project Tasks' related link is present
steps.locatorHint: Related tab -> 'Project Tasks' related list link

steps.targetDescription: Open Project Tasks related list
steps.locatorHint: Related tab -> 'Project Tasks' related list link

steps.targetDescription: Project Tasks list/table is visible
steps.locatorHint: Related list 'Project Tasks' table

steps.targetDescription: Verify tasks list is displayed
steps.locatorHint: Related list 'Project Tasks' table

steps.targetDescription: Verify at least one task shows status 'Planned'
steps.locatorHint: Project Tasks list rows status column

steps.targetDescription: Open a task whose status is Planned (click task name in the Planned row)
steps.locatorHint: Project Tasks list row with status 'Planned' -> task name link

steps.targetDescription: Project Task Detail page is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header for Project Task

steps.targetDescription: Verify task Status is Planned on detail page
steps.locatorHint: field label 'Status' value

steps.targetDescription: Verify Start button is shown for Planned task
steps.locatorHint: button[text='Start']

steps.targetDescription: Click Start to begin the task
steps.locatorHint: button[text='Start']

steps.targetDescription: Wait for status update to complete
Verify task Status updated to Started on detail page
steps.locatorHint: field label 'Status' value

cases.title: Global search is case-insensitive for project name via typeahead
preconditions: Project '360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation' exists.

steps.targetDescription: Open Salesforce PSA Home page
Global search input is visible
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox

steps.targetDescription: Enter project name in lower case
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox
steps.value: 360 health and commu - q-383470 - ready fixed fee implementation

steps.targetDescription: Typeahead results list appears
steps.locatorHint: search typeahead results listbox

steps.targetDescription: Select matching project from typeahead results
steps.locatorHint: typeahead option matching full project name (any case)

steps.targetDescription: Project Detail page header is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header title

steps.targetDescription: Verify Project Detail header shows canonical project name
steps.locatorHint: record page header title
steps.assertion: 360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation

cases.title: Start one task when multiple Planned tasks exist and verify others remain Planned
preconditions: Project '360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation' exists and has two or more Project Tasks with status Planned.

steps.targetDescription: Open Salesforce PSA Home page
Global search input is visible
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox

steps.targetDescription: Enter project name in Global search
steps.locatorHint: global header search input [placeholder='Search...'] or role=combobox
steps.value: 360 HEALTH AND COMMU - Q-383470 - Ready Fixed Fee Implementation

steps.targetDescription: Typeahead results list appears
steps.locatorHint: search typeahead results listbox

steps.targetDescription: Select matching project from typeahead results
steps.locatorHint: typeahead option matching full project name

steps.targetDescription: Project Detail page header is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header title

steps.targetDescription: Open Project Tasks related list
steps.locatorHint: Related tab -> 'Project Tasks' related list link

steps.targetDescription: Project Tasks list/table is visible
steps.locatorHint: Related list 'Project Tasks' table

steps.targetDescription: Verify more than one Planned task is listed
steps.locatorHint: status badges/text 'Planned' within Project Tasks rows

steps.targetDescription: Open one of the Planned tasks (click task name in a Planned row)
steps.locatorHint: Project Tasks list row with status 'Planned' -> task name link

steps.targetDescription: Project Task Detail page is visible
steps.locatorHint: record page header for Project Task

steps.targetDescription: Start the selected Planned task
steps.locatorHint: button[text='Start']

steps.targetDescription: Wait for status update to complete
Verify task Status updated to Started on detail page
steps.locatorHint: field label 'Status' value

steps.targetDescription: Return to Project Tasks list
Project Tasks list/table is visible again
steps.locatorHint: Related list 'Project Tasks' table

steps.targetDescription: Verify at least one other task remains in Planned status
steps.locatorHint: status badges/text 'Planned' within Project Tasks rows
